title: Re:Spawned
description: Adds re:zero return from death sound after respawn (obviously), tp and logging into the world (Client side mod)
body:
It's a small client side mod, that plays "return from death" sound after player respawn, teleportation or logging on server. Highly recommended to play with immediate respawn.

_This is my first mod and I would love suggestions for improvements. If you have any suggestions or have noticed a bug, please let me know by creating an issue on github._

(I just started porting the mod to forge, so **if you are using the forge version of the mod, then you need to install it on the server too**)
